title: Residential patterning at Angkor Wat | Antiquity | Cambridge Core
highlights: Abstract Considerable attention has been devoted to the architecture and art history of Cambodia's Angkor Wat temple in the last century. There has, however, been little research on the functions and internal organisation of the large rectangular enclosure surrounding the temple.
